design_philosophy.core_concept: A futuristic, high-energy digital hub for gamers. Not just a store, but a terminal for power-ups. Dark, immersive, and electric.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Cyberpunk meets Clean Commerce. High contrast neon accents on deep void backgrounds. Noise textures, glowing borders, and glassmorphism.

usage_rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-tight, Rajdhani (Bold/SemiBold). Use for section titles and hero text.
usage_rules.subheadings: Space Grotesk. Use for card titles and feature highlights.
usage_rules.body: Plus Jakarta Sans. High legibility for descriptions and form labels.
usage_rules.data: JetBrains Mono. Use for Game IDs, Transaction Codes, and Prices.

grid_system.catalog: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 font-rajdhani uppercase tracking-wider font-bold rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-secondary hover:text-secondary hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)] transition-all duration-300 font-rajdhani uppercase tracking-wider font-bold rounded-md

cards.game_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl
cards.feature_card: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-2xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 font-mono rounded-md

navigation.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border-b border-white/5 h-16

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all text (Use light gray on black, not dark gray).
Interactive elements must have visible focus states (Use Ring-Primary).
Do not rely solely on color for status (Use icons + text).

setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and font families provided.
Add the Google Fonts import to the top of index.css.
Apply the 'dark' class to the html or body tag by default.
Install lucide-react, framer-motion, and clsx if not present.
implementation_guide: Marketing/Home: Use the 'hero_background' with a heavy overlay (bg-black/70) so text pops.
Cards: Use the 'game_card' style for the product catalog.
Forms: All inputs should look like terminal inputs (dark, monospace font).
Layout: Avoid standard white backgrounds entirely. Use the 'background.default' color.
Reseller Dashboard: Use a dense grid (Mode B from spacing strategy) for data tables.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
